title: Peek-a-Boo Seasons with Zuri
synopsis: Join Zuri as she plays peek-a-boo with nature through the changing seasons, discovering flowers in spring, butterflies in summer, leaves in autumn, and snowflakes in winter.

pages.text: Spring is here! Where are the flowers? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, playing peek-a-boo behind blooming cherry blossom trees with soft pink and white flowers, spring pastel colors fill the scene with gentle greens and light blues
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo behind spring flowers

pages.text: Summer sunshine! Where are the butterflies? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, hiding behind tall sunflowers as colorful butterflies flutter around, bright summer colors with golden yellows, vibrant oranges, and deep blues
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo with summer butterflies

pages.text: Autumn time! Where are the falling leaves? Peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, peeking through a pile of colorful autumn leaves with warm oranges, deep reds, and golden browns creating a cozy fall atmosphere
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo in autumn leaves

pages.text: Winter wonder! Where are the snowflakes? Peek-a-boo! Seasons come and go!

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, playing behind snow-covered evergreen trees as gentle snowflakes fall, cool winter palette with soft whites, pale blues, and silvery grays
illustration.alt: Zuri playing peek-a-boo in winter snow

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Zuri find in spring?
questions.explanation: In spring, Zuri finds beautiful flowers blooming!

questions.question: What flies around in summer?
questions.explanation: Butterflies love to fly around in the warm summer sunshine!
